body.title: [sprint] Remove dead CC-spawn functions from granny/dispatch.py (footgun)
body.description:
devices/granny/dispatch.py contains cc_dispatch_fn, inference_dispatch_fn, and _launch_cc_instance, which subprocess.Popen a `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -p /sprint-ticket` instance. These are NOT imported or called anywhere in the live wiring (verified by grep) — the daemon routes everything through _dispatch_bus (IMAP envelope) per D-cc-shim-assignment-model-2026-06-06. But they directly contradict feedback_granny_no_cc_spawn (Granny NEVER subprocess.Popen for CC) and feedback_cc_concurrency_hard_limit (one CC at a time). Leaving them present is a re-wiring footgun: anyone reconnecting dispatch.py to the daemon re-introduces the forbidden auto-spawn. Remove the spawn functions (or gut them to raise NotImplementedError with a pointer to the bus model). Keep nothing that can Popen a CC.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py (and any test importing it)
**Design rules:** none apply (deletion of dead code); honors feedback_granny_no_cc_spawn
**Scope boundary:** IN: remove/neuter cc_dispatch_fn, inference_dispatch_fn, _launch_cc_instance. OUT: changing the live bus dispatch path in daemon.py.
**Test plan:** grep confirms no importers; run any granny test module after removal. no new tests because: pure dead-code removal.
